message:
chore: Sync beads after closing bd-1jt.3.2

- bd-1jt.3.2: Homebrew/Scoop formula update command implemented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-1jt.3.1","title":"Implement dsr release command - upload artifacts to GitHub","description":"# Implement `dsr release` — Upload Artifacts to GitHub

## Purpose
Create a GitHub Release from locally built artifacts, with retries, verification, and consistent metadata.

## Command Interface
```bash
dsr release <tool> <version>
 dsr release <tool> <version> --artifacts <dir>
 dsr release <tool> <version> --draft
 dsr release <tool> <version> --generate-notes
 dsr release <tool> <version> --verify-tag
 dsr release <tool> <version> --dry-run
 dsr release <tool> <version> --resume
```

## Required Inputs
- Build manifest (source of truth)
- Checksums + signatures
- Optional SBOM + provenance

## Release Flow
1. Validate manifest + checksums
2. Create release tag (verify exists)
3. Upload binaries + checksums + signatures
4. Upload SBOM + provenance if configured
5. Verify assets match manifest

## Idempotency / Resume
- Safe to re-run (`gh release upload --clobber`)
- Track partial uploads in state for resume

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Release created with correct tag & notes
- [ ] All assets uploaded and verified
- [ ] Works for all tools
- [ ] JSON report includes asset list + validation results
- [ ] Resume re-uploads only missing/failed assets","notes":"Patched src/act_runner.sh (act_get_repo + manifest filename) and src/github.sh (upload via curl token to avoid gh tag parsing). Still blocked on dsr lock to fix cmd_release artifacts_dir/manifest verification and add --dry-run.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:13:53.575381627Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T19:37:21.766242303Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T19:37:21.766105245Z","close_reason":"Release command fully implemented at lines 1754-2193 with: argument parsing, GH auth check, tool config loading, tag verification, GitHub release creation via gh_create_release, asset uploading with resume support, manifest verification, and JSON output. Helper functions in src/github.sh provide the API layer.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-11r","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T18:09:50.900049447Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:02.228966845Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:15:41.414912067Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.2.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:22.386430911Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:13:53.575381627Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:52.882491227Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:26:54.944683486Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:38:53.751889231Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.7.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T17:52:05.559597020Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-1jt.3.10","title":"Implement release verification + retry/resume uploads","description":"# Implement Release Verification + Retry/Resume Uploads

## Purpose
Ensure GitHub releases contain the exact expected assets, and recover safely from partial upload failures.

## Verification Steps
- Compare release assets against build manifest
- Verify checksums.sha256 matches uploaded binaries
- Optionally re-download and verify sha256 for spot checks

## Retry Strategy
- Use `gh release upload --clobber` for failed assets
- Track failed uploads in state file for resume
- Idempotent uploads (safe to re-run)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Missing assets detected and reported
- [ ] Partial uploads can be resumed safely
- [ ] Release verification produces JSON report
- [ ] Re-running verification does not create duplicate assets","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:36:58.956655125Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T19:37:38.515340314Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T19:37:38.515123796Z","close_reason":"Implemented cmd_release_verify function (lines 2199-2462) with: manifest comparison, checksum verification (download + sha256), --fix flag for re-uploading missing assets, and JSON verification report. Added 'dsr release verify' subcommand routing.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.10","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.1.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:12.415821448Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.10","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.2.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:22.651659081Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.10","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:36:58.956655125Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.10","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:40.580783022Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-1jt.3.11","title":"Add pre-release quality gates (typecheck/lint/test) per tool","description":"# Add Pre-Release Quality Gates (typecheck/lint/test) per Tool

## Purpose
Ensure every release passes the tool's own quality checks before upload to GitHub.

## Behavior
- Read `checks` from `repos.d/<tool>.yaml`
- Run checks in deterministic order
- Support `--skip-checks` and `--dry-run`
- Log per-check duration + exit code
- Fail release if any check fails (exit 1/6 depending on stage)

## Output
- stderr: human-readable summary
- stdout (JSON): list of checks, durations, exit codes

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Checks run per-tool before release upload
- [ ] Failures block release with clear errors
- [ ] JSON output includes per-check results
- [ ] Dry-run shows planned checks","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:37:06.086111454Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T18:27:28.402142395Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T18:27:28.402125253Z","close_reason":"Implemented src/quality_gates.sh module with qg_run_checks() and qg_get_checks(). Added 'dsr quality' command with --dry-run, --skip-checks, --work-dir options. Reads checks from repos.yaml, logs per-check results with durations, returns JSON with passed/failed counts. Exit 1 on failure.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.11","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T17:50:21.256627491Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.11","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:47.402939311Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.11","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:37:06.086111454Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-1jt.3.2","title":"Update Homebrew and Scoop formulas after release","description":"# Update Homebrew and Scoop Formulas After Release

## Purpose
Update package manager metadata so users can install via `brew` and `scoop` with correct URLs + SHA256.

## Homebrew
- Update formula in `homebrew-tap`
- Use temp workdir in `/tmp` (never `/data/projects`)
- Validate with `brew audit --strict` and `brew style` when available
- Respect `--dry-run` (plan only)

## Scoop
- Update manifest JSON in `scoop-bucket`
- Use `sha256:<hex>` format
- Use temp workdir in `/tmp`
- Validate JSON and run `scoop checkver` when available

## Logging / Output
- stderr: human-readable summary
- stdout: JSON (when `--json`) listing updated formula/manifest paths + checksums

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Formula/manifest updated with correct version + hashes
- [ ] Dry-run available and deterministic
- [ ] Validation commands executed when available
- [ ] Works for all tools without touching `/data/projects`","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:23:34.632986314Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T19:42:45.245516174Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:23:34.632986314Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:26:56.108363071Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.7.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T17:39:56.629546588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-1jt.3.3","title":"Implement minisign artifact signing","description":"# Implement Minisign Artifact Signing

## Purpose
Sign every release artifact so users can verify authenticity.

## Requirements
- Sign every binary + checksums.sha256
- Store signatures as `.minisig` files
- Use password-protected key from secrets store

## Installer Integration
- Verify signatures when minisign present
- Fail when `--require-signatures` is set

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All binaries + checksum file signed
- [ ] Signatures uploaded with releases
- [ ] Installers verify signatures","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:23:59.730105373Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T18:16:01.600966648Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T18:16:01.600949125Z","close_reason":"Minisign signing module complete in src/signing.sh: keypair generation (init), configuration check, single file signing (sign), batch signing (sign_batch), signature verification (verify), public key extraction (pubkey), permission fixing (fix). CLI exposed via 'dsr signing' subcommand. Integration with release/installer commands will happen in bd-1jt.3.1 and bd-1jt.4.x.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:23:59.730105373Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:24:03.620154033Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-1jt.3.4","title":"Generate SBOM (Software Bill of Materials) for releases","description":"# Generate SBOM (Software Bill of Materials) for Releases

## Purpose
Produce SBOMs for each release to improve supply-chain transparency.

## Formats
- SPDX JSON
- CycloneDX JSON

## Behavior
- Generate SBOMs after build, before release
- Attach as release assets
- For container images, attach SBOM attestation if enabled

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SBOMs generated for each release
- [ ] Uploaded to GitHub release
- [ ] Works for Rust/Go/Bun projects","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:28:31.491498168Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T15:58:40.102566527Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:30:47.963689719Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:28:31.491498168Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-1jt.3.5","title":"Implement checksum auto-sync across flywheel repos","description":"# Checksum Auto-Sync Across Flywheel Repos

## Purpose
Update checksum manifests in downstream repos when installers change.

## Behavior
- Triggered after dsr release
- Recalculate checksums, update target repo in /tmp (never `/data/projects`)
- Use `git -C <repo>` for all git operations
- For external tools, open a security review issue instead of auto-merge

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Checksums recalculated after each release
- [ ] External changes flagged for review
- [ ] JSON output for verification","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:28:44.275881995Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T17:53:30.421759326Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:28:44.275881995Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:30:48.145176916Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
